nodes.name: Fetch Brand Profile
nodes.notes: Fetch brand context for on-brand copy generation

nodes.name: Fetch Offer Context
nodes.notes: Fetch offer details (pain points, ICP, awareness level, etc.)

nodes.name: Fetch Swipe Patterns

nodes.name: Claude: Generate Image Ad Copy
nodes.notes: Claude generates N copy variants using brand context, offer data, and swipe patterns as reference.
